name: recent-fallback-penalty
description: v1.7 — validates RECENT_FALLBACK_PENALTY feedback loop on a NEUTRAL transcript where no persona has a strong pattern match. Troll normally wins neutral ticks via baseline (+2) + random tiebreak. Seeded with 3 recent fallbacks → -6 penalty → troll's score crashes to -4 and falls out of contention. Joker's baseline +1 wins. Proves the feedback loop: a persona who's been missing lately drops out of rotation on uncontested ticks. NOT a veto — strong content matches (Elon + trust-me style) would still surface troll because pattern scoring dwarfs the penalty. That's the balance invariant rule #2 in DESIGN-PRINCIPLES.md.
